1.premise: Selling overpriced rocks could be the fulfillment of the 3,000-year-old Jewish promise of land.
Any existing public infrastructure could be reframed as a personal Trump achievement.

lines.text: - Hell yeah, sorry for spilling that drink on you,
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: by the way, that was rude of me.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Appreciate you guys up there.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Yeah, I'm not retarded,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but I spent $15 for rocks.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Anybody have that problem?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I don't know.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I'm starting to think that Cam Patterson sold out.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He jumped off the Kill Tony show, went straight to SNL.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And all of a sudden he's selling rocks for $15.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It's like they were promised to him 3,000 years ago.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Isn't that right?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: All right, all right, well enough about the Jews.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Let's talk about Corpus Christi, Texas, where I'm from.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Donald Trump was just there yesterday.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Everybody give a hand for Donald Trump.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: The greatest president to ever live.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You see this beautiful bridge.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I built that bridge.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: My administration, we built it in 2017.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Sleepy Joe Biden, Sleepy Joe Biden.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: He cut the port, he cut the funding,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: and then we brought it back in 2020.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: You can move all you want, but he's the greatest president.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Am I right, Tony?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: You're my right.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Let's not get you political, though.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: OK.
lines.label: fluff
